page: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs derived from 32 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The CPU includes 48 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per core. The server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 10%. Multi-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression. Memory performance is highly competitive; the PassMark memory score is in the top 10%, supported by strong memory bandwidth results of 203.18 GB/sec for large block read-only operations and 133.05 GB/sec for large block write operations.

This server is highly optimized for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and memory-cached applications. PassMark database operations rank in the top 10%, and Redis SET operations achieve strong performance in the top 25%. For artificial intelligence workloads, the server delivers top-tier performance for small and medium LLM inference text generation, though performance drops to average for large 70B models. The lack of local NVMe storage means all storage operations must rely on external Premium Storage, which represents a key architectural tradeoff for disk-heavy applications.
description: The Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with 32 physical cores, it delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per core. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU and memory performance, with PassMark database operations and memory scores ranking in the top 10%. While it lacks local storage and GPUs, it is Premium Storage capable and supports advanced vector extensions (AVX-512). This configuration is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, Redis caching, and medium-scale LLM inference workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and top-tier database and single-core CPU benchmark performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is a memory-optimized server with 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and top-tier database performance.
tagline: A high-memory x86 server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and exceptional memory bandwidth for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9V45 processors at 4.5 GHz.
1024.0 GB of system memory delivering 16.0 GB per core.
Top-tier database, memory, and single-core CPU benchmark performance.
No local storage, requiring external Premium Storage configurations.
Optimized for large-scale databases, Redis caching, and LLM inference.
